title: Snowflake ID generator
description: Implement a 64-bit time-sortable snowflake ID generator. 48 bits Unix milliseconds + 16 bits per-process sequence counter. Thread-safe with AtomicU64. This is ~50 lines — do not take an external dependency for this. IDs must be serialized as strings in JSON because JavaScript cannot handle 64-bit integers. All ID columns in the schema use these.
design: SnowflakeGen struct with AtomicU64 storing (last_ms << 16) | seq. On generate: read current ms, if same as last increment seq, if different reset seq and update ms. Wrap in once_cell or pass as Arc. Newtype Id(i64) that serializes as string.
acceptance_criteria: IDs are monotonically increasing; two calls in the same millisecond produce different IDs; IDs serialize as strings in serde (use #[serde(serialize_with=...)] or newtype wrapper); IDs fit in i64 (SQLite INTEGER is 64-bit signed)
